features.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed preload crash in production builds (duplicate api declaration, app module import)
Fixed FPS warning modal stealing clicks from login/modal z-index layers
Fixed DOMContentLoaded race condition with ES module scripts in ASAR
Fixed Canvas 2D desynchronized context causing drawImage crashes in production
Fixed button hitbox alignment and text blur in production builds
Fixed nav pill overlap with content area

features.title: UX Improvements
items: Crossfade transitions when switching between Bubbles and Rain animations
Rain animation with object-pooled drops, volumetric cloud deck, themed lightning
Performance-optimized storm rendering (80 drops, 3 blur clouds)
Added padding-top to content area to prevent page overlap

features.title: macOS Identity
items: Dock, menu bar, and keychain now show 'Lean Launcher' instead of 'Electron'
Custom Lean Launcher icon visible in Dock, app switcher, and About panel
App root path passed via --app-root argument for reliable cross-process resolution

features.title: CI/CD
items: GitHub Actions workflow for multi-platform builds (Windows, macOS x64/arm64, Linux)
Automatic GitHub Release publishing via electron-builder

title: This is the first release of Lean Launcher.

features.title: Lean Launcher Features
items: Custom version creation and editing
Per-instance settings with RAM and JVM controls
Instance file manager with upload and drag/drop support
Theme system, language selection, and profile selection

features.title: Client Features
items: Performance-focused client experience
Lean Client Old version support
Multiple version targets and profile options
Ready for lightweight and customizable setups

features.title: macOS Enhancements
items: Dock, menu bar, and keychain now show 'Lean Launcher' instead of 'Electron'
Custom Lean Launcher icon visible in the Dock and app switcher
